benefit_houserent_description: Increase employees satisfaction by paying their house rents. (Increases satisfaction by 100%)
benefit_freebills_description: Increase employees satisfaction by paying their bills. (Increases satisfaction by 60%)
benefit_freecomputers_description: Give free computers to your employees so that they can communicate with other employees at home. (Increases satisfaction by 50%)
benefit_freerepair_description: Computers sometimes break. Pay the Repair Service to fix the computers of your employees for free. (Increases satisfaction by 30%)
benefit_theatertickets_description: Increase employees satisfaction by giving them free theater tickets. (Increases satisfaction by 50%)
benefit_pizzadelivery_description: Increase employees satisfaction by giving them free pizzas!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! (Increases satisfaction by 20%)
newbenefits_stringsnotavailable: If you select a language, and you still see English strings, this means that the string is not translated.
tutorial_settings: Once you select the language from the dropdown, every string should be translated. If you still see English but you are 100% sure that the strings are translated, select English and then the language you selected before. This should fix the issue.
